title: Random Bongos
description: Random bongo sounds that play well... randomly. Used to be exclusively forge 1.20.1 but now neoforge 1.21.1 with lots of changes and more bongos due to seeing my mod in a video.
body:
Introducing Random Bongos!
Was only forge 1.20.1 (still here). Now in neoforge 1.21.1 (because thats what me and my friend now play).

Bongo sounds can either happen randomly or by chance via certian triggers (all configurable in newest version neoforge 1.21.1).


Very happy to add this but found my mod in this video by TheMightyNebby: (https://youtu.be/cjvZVRFczO0?si=QYuOtrou_ijaZRbE) (two of the sounds can be found 11:14 and 12:00). First time i've seen one of my mods out in the wild! (thats why its now updated and improved with second version).
